name: infaernum-rpg-fvtt
description: Sistema Foundry VTT para Old Infærnum

scripts.pack:build: npx fvtt package pack -n cavaleiros --in packs/sources/cavaleiros --out packs/cavaleiros && npx fvtt package pack -n rolltables --in packs/sources/rolltables --out packs/rolltables && npx fvtt package pack -n cenarios --in packs/sources/cenarios --out packs/cenarios
